text: HAHAHA all these nerds tryna get with someone OUT OF THIER LEAGUE! Now if this was a guy playing, these comments would be HELLUVA lot different, and there would be whiny, bitchy people everywhere. Oh wait. Anyways, gotta love "white knights' and 'Pervs' lol
author: @chazmann95

text: It may be inappropriate and unwelcome, but it's certainly not derogatory :S
author: @TeddyBearBonfire

text:
I think that cultural attitude only exists within the very men involved. AKA, it's their excuse for themselves to make such comments and thus they'll continue to do so. Thus, who cares what they think?

That was my point: the only "culture" where that's socially ingrained is the "culture" of the very men who make such remarks; it's not something that any other man or any woman commonly accepts as truth or would blame the woman for.

At least, not where I've lived. (the US, Germany...)
author: @Longknife

text: Comments like "me gusta" aren't derogatory, they're just sexualised. Can you honestly say you've never said anything of a similar spirit about a man? I know I'm prone to doing so perhaps way too much! We're sexual creatures (not accounting for asexuals! :P), there's nothing to be ashamed of about it. We all know there's a lot of sexual & demeaning comments out there ("begging for it", as you said, certainly falls under that one - pisses me right off), but "me gusta" is not it!
author: @TeddyBearBonfire

text: It doesn't bother me that people fantasize over me. That's going to happen. It bothers me that there is an ingrained, societally accepted﻿ attitude that whenever derogatory things are said about a woman, she must have 'deserved' it, and the man gets off scot-free.
author: @lara6683

text: Well I think it's important to just remember the exact people who take things such as that skirt or this intro or what have you as a case of "asking for it," are typically hopeless causes. Those are excuses they feed themselves to justify their desperate fantasies, and they'll continue to do so no matter what you do. But given that they're THAT desperate....who cares what they think? Those kinds of people are the kinds of people I ignore. That's really the best solution.
author: @Longknife

text: You know, if you're just here for ass shots, there's whole websites out there that might suit you better...
author: @TheFinalSmash

text: What I can do is stand up against it! It's pretty hard to change society's collective attitude, but if I can change the thinking of one or two people, that's pretty good.
author: @lara6683

text: Amazing. Zelda for life. Lol @ all the comments pointing out random mistakes that aren't even there.
author: @HysteriaXHF

text: Wasn't blaming. I simply meant that with that video, the MOMENT I saw that skirt I could hear the comments coming. I meant it is how it is and it does attract such comments. You're not responsible for wearing things specifically to dodge such comments and anyone who thinks YOU are begging for it is dumb, cause you've made it abundantly clear you're not, but it's just a fact it might provoke such comments. Clearly that's annoying for you if you loathe such comments, but yeah...what can you do? :/
author: @Longknife

text: Why must we always blame the woman for derogatory comments made against her? Why do we as society view this as acceptable? The people who are MAKING the comments are ones to blame here. I should be allowed to wear a dress with a fun design that covers all pertinent body parts without being accused of 'begging for it'. Society is sick.
author: @lara6683

text:
Ok, cause yeah, was gonna say...

Between this opening and the little NES skirt that was begging for the "HEY BBY CAN I PRESS UR START BUTTON HYUCK HYUCK HYUCK" pick-up line, I was thinking "damn Lara, you're naive as hell."

Personally I know it probably annoys you, but I watch your videos for music first, and second to watch the white knights do battle with the desperate pervs on who gets to be your e-boyfriend. Comments section is always funny stuff; adds to the enjoyment for me. :P
author: @Longknife

text:
While the lady is lovely, i actually come to see her other talents. you know... the ones that involve her admiration and love of great videogame music, as well as her devotion and skill on the piano and violin.

She always does a wonderful job, and never once seems to disappoint.
author: @tienxero

text: I included it cause I was a total novice at video recording :P Didn't know how to edit it out. I get annoyed because I am trying to put MUSIC out there, not my body. I'm wearing trackpants for god's sake :P Yes I do understand men, which is why the vast majority hold no interest for me at all. That being said, not all men are like that.
author: @lara6683

text:
I wonder how lara feels seeing comments like this, given that she always seems annoyed at any comments that sexualize her.

Having said that, my initial thought at 0:00 to 0:02 was "Really lara? You don't see it coming? Do you not understand men at all?" Dunno why she included that in if she hates such comments.
